# env/swanki-mineru-requirements.txt
#
# Isolated MinerU 2.x OCR env. MinerU bundles its own torch CUDA runtime and a
# torch-based PaddleOCR fork; keep it out of the swanki (Python 3.13) env to
# avoid two CUDA runtimes in one environment.
#
# Create: mamba create -n swanki-mineru python=3.11 && \
#         pip install -r env/swanki-mineru-requirements.txt
# Runner: scripts/run_mineru_swanki.py
#
# torch<2.11 forces a CUDA 12 build; torch 2.11+ ships cu13 wheels that refuse
# to init against cu12.x drivers.
mineru[pipeline]>=2.0.0,<3
torch<2.11
torchvision<0.26
huggingface_hub>=0.23
